name: Green Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut pork into 1/2-inch squares and fry with the pork bones over low heat until brown and slightly dry.
- If the pork is very fatty, pour off all but 4 or 5 tablespoons of the grease.
2. Strain tomatoes into an 8-quart saucepan and coarsely chop them.
3. Combine chopped tomatoes, tomato sauce, hot water, cooked pork, and pork bones in the same saucepan.
4. Bring to a rapid boil and continue boiling for 20 minutes.
5. Add spices (sugar, salt), diced hot peppers, and chili strips.
6. Continue boiling for another 20 minutes.
7. Cook on medium heat until desired thickness, usually another 20 minutes.
8. Remove bones and serve over enchiladas, burritos, or by the bowlful.
